view.title: Validate persona scenario #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the behavior of agent baselines and drift detection, but the evidence provided does not demonstrate a clear outcome or actionable failure report. The linked use case discusses the need for stable grant contracts and predictable behavior when sources are disabled, yet it lacks concrete evidence of the system's performance in this context. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as it does not meet the requirement for deterministic outcome validation.
